name: Warplate of the Interred

note: First-pass bonuses. Piece-to-item assignment ships with raid tiers (Phase 2+).

bonus4pc: Pyromancer: detonations deal +20%. Arcanist: party barrier is 15% stronger.

name: Garb of the Evergreen
